use_cases: Interactive navigation arrow icon with Lottie animation support for directional cues
Clickable icon component with configurable play and toggle direction behaviors on interaction
Reusable animated icon with customizable color and size for various UI contexts
ai_summary: Ringlabs Interactive Animated Arrow Icon is a lightweight React component that renders Lottie Web animations for arrow icons with rich interaction support including click-to-play, hover controls, and directional toggling. It accepts external JSON animation data via URL or direct import, supports black/white color modes, and offers configurable size and autoplay settings for flexible integration across web applications.
